---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
###Code from Jupyter
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(emmeans)

library(dplyr)

# Finished, Consent_agree and Eligibility_agree need to == 1, Psychedelics_EverUse need to be 1 to continue analysis

source("/Users/eweisma1/Downloads/NFCSurvey/NFC_functions.R")

df <- read.csv("/Users/eweisma1/Downloads/NFCSurvey/NFC.csv", check.names = FALSE)
names(df) <- trimws(names(df))
names(df) <- gsub("\\.$", "", names(df))
df

df_clean <- df %>%
  filter(
    Finished == 1,
    Consent_agree == 1,
    Eligibility_agree == 1,
    Psychedelics_EverUse == 1
  )

dim(df_clean)

# now we will compare user response to attention_chk_1 correct being 4; attention_chk_2 correct being 3; attention_chk_3 correct being 4, if the mean accuracy across all three checks is below 66%, then do not include that participant so another cleaning level
df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(
    # convert to numeric
    attention_chk_1 = as.numeric(attention_chk_1),
    attention_chk_2 = as.numeric(attention_chk_2),
    attention_chk_3 = as.numeric(attention_chk_3),
    
    # count wrong answers, ignoring NA
    attention_wrong = rowSums(
      cbind(
        attention_chk_1 != 4,
        attention_chk_2 != 3,
        attention_chk_3 != 4
      ),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )
df_clean_attention <- df_clean %>% filter(attention_wrong <= 1)
df_clean_attention <- cbind(ID = seq_len(nrow(df_clean_attention)), df_clean_attention)
df_clean_attention
data_clean <- df_clean_attention

#calculate MEQ Scores
source("QA_Library.R")
meq_cols <- paste0("MEQ_", 1:30)
data_clean[meq_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[meq_cols], as.numeric)
meq_output <- meq.scoring(data_clean)

#calculate CEQ Scores
ceq_cols <- paste0("CEQ_", 1:26)
data_clean[ceq_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[ceq_cols], as.numeric)
ceq_output <- ceq.scoring(data_clean)

#calculate Psychological Insight (PIQ) Scores
piq_cols <- paste0("PsychInsight_", 1:23)
data_clean[piq_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[piq_cols], as.numeric)
piq_output <- psychinsight.scoring(data_clean)

#calculate AAQ pre and post scores
aaqpre_cols <- paste0("AAQ_pre_", 1:7)
data_clean[aaqpre_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[aaqpre_cols], as.numeric)
aaqpre_output <- aaq.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", aaqpre_cols)])
aaqpost_cols <- paste0("AAQ_post_", 1:7)
data_clean[aaqpost_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[aaqpost_cols], as.numeric)
aaqpost_output <- aaq.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", aaqpost_cols)])
aaq_combined <- merge(aaqpre_output, aaqpost_output, by = "keeps", suffixes = c("_pre", "_post"))
aaq_combined$aaq_delta <- aaq_combined$aaq.total_post - aaq_combined$aaq.total_pre
names(aaq_combined)[names(aaq_combined) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

#calculate NFC pre and post scores
nfcpre_cols <- paste0("NfC_Pre_", 1:18)
data_clean[nfcpre_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[nfcpre_cols], as.numeric)
nfcpre_output <- nfc.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", nfcpre_cols)])
nfcpost_cols <- paste0("NfC_Post_", 1:18)
data_clean[nfcpost_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[nfcpost_cols], as.numeric)
nfcpost_output <- nfc.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", nfcpost_cols)])
nfc_combined <- merge(nfcpre_output, nfcpost_output, by = "keeps", suffixes = c("_pre", "_post"))
nfc_combined$nfc_delta <- nfc_combined$nfc.total_post - nfc_combined$nfc.total_pre
names(nfc_combined)[names(nfc_combined) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

#calculate CFS pre and post scores
cfspre_cols <- paste0("CFS_Pre_", 1:12)
data_clean[cfspre_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[cfspre_cols], as.numeric)
cfspre_output <- cfs.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", cfspre_cols)])
cfspost_cols <- paste0("CFS_Post_", 1:12)
data_clean[cfspost_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[cfspost_cols], as.numeric)
cfspost_output <- cfs.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", cfspost_cols)])
cfs_combined <- merge(cfspre_output, cfspost_output, by = "keeps", suffixes = c("_pre", "_post"))
cfs_combined$cfs_delta <- cfs_combined$cfs.total_post - cfs_combined$cfs.total_pre
names(cfs_combined)[names(cfs_combined) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

#calculate WMQ pre and post scores
wmqpre_cols <- paste0("WMQ_Pre_", 1:30)
data_clean[wmqpre_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[wmqpre_cols], as.numeric)
wmqpre_output <- wmq.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", wmqpre_cols)])
wmqpost_cols <- paste0("WMQ_Post_", 1:30)
data_clean[wmqpost_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[wmqpost_cols], as.numeric)
wmqpost_output <- wmq.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", wmqpost_cols)])
wmq_combined <- merge(wmqpre_output, wmqpost_output, by = "keeps", suffixes = c("_pre", "_post"))
wmq_combined$wmq_totaldelta <- wmq_combined$wmq.total_post - wmq_combined$wmq.total_pre
wmq_combined$wmq_storagedelta <- wmq_combined$wmq.storage_post - wmq_combined$wmq.storage_pre
wmq_combined$wmq_attentiondelta <- wmq_combined$wmq.attention_post - wmq_combined$wmq.attention_pre
wmq_combined$wmq_executivedelta <- wmq_combined$wmq.executive_post - wmq_combined$wmq.executive_pre
names(wmq_combined)[names(wmq_combined) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

#calculate DASS pre and post scores
dasspre_cols <- paste0("DASS_pre_", 1:21)
data_clean[dasspre_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[dasspre_cols], as.numeric)
dasspre_output <- dassprepost.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", dasspre_cols)])
dasspost_cols <- paste0("DASS_post_", 1:21)
data_clean[dasspost_cols] <- lapply(data_clean[dasspost_cols], as.numeric)
dasspost_output <- dassprepost.scoring(data_clean[, c("ID", dasspost_cols)])
dass_combined <- merge(dasspre_output, dasspost_output, by = "keeps", suffixes = c("_pre", "_post"))
dass_combined$dass_depressiondelta <- dass_combined$dass.depression_post - dass_combined$dass.depression_pre
dass_combined$dass_anxietydelta <- dass_combined$dass.anxiety_post - dass_combined$dass.anxiety_pre #negative indicates improvement in symptoms
dass_combined$dass_stressdelta <- dass_combined$dass.stress_post - dass_combined$dass.stress_pre
names(dass_combined)[names(dass_combined) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

#Make bar graphs for all change scores as a function of psychedelics_when
aaq_combined <- left_join(aaq_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_when")], by = "ID")
nfc_combined <- left_join(nfc_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_when")], by = "ID")
cfs_combined <- left_join(cfs_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_when")], by = "ID")
wmq_combined <- left_join(wmq_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_when")], by = "ID")
dass_combined <- left_join(dass_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_when")], by = "ID")
label_levels <- c("<1mo", "3-6mo", "6-12mo", "1-3yr", ">3yr")

for(df in list(aaq_combined, nfc_combined, cfs_combined, wmq_combined, dass_combined)){
  df$Psychedelics_when <- factor(df$Psychedelics_when, levels = 1:5, labels = label_levels)
}
plot_delta_when(nfc_combined, "nfc_delta", "NFC Change")
plot_delta_when(aaq_combined, "aaq_delta", "AAQ Change")
plot_delta_when(cfs_combined, "cfs_delta", "CFS Change")
plot_delta_when(wmq_combined, "wmq_totaldelta", "WMQ Total Change")
plot_delta_when(wmq_combined, "wmq_storagedelta", "WMQ Storage Change")
plot_delta_when(wmq_combined, "wmq_attentiondelta", "WMQ Attention Change")
plot_delta_when(wmq_combined, "wmq_executivedelta", "WMQ Executive Change")
plot_delta_when(dass_combined, "dass_depressiondelta", "DASS Depression Change")
plot_delta_when(dass_combined, "dass_anxietydelta", "DASS Anxiety Change")
plot_delta_when(dass_combined, "dass_stressdelta", "DASS Stress Change")

#Mixed Effects of NFC
nfc_long <- nfc_combined %>%
  select(ID, nfc.total_pre, nfc.total_post) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(nfc.total_pre, nfc.total_post),
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "nfc_total"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(time, levels = c("nfc.total_pre", "nfc.total_post"), labels = c("pre", "post"))
  )
nfc_long <- nfc_long %>%
  left_join(
    data_clean %>% select(ID, Psychedelics_when),
    by = "ID"
  )
nfc_long$Psychedelics_when <- factor(
  nfc_long$Psychedelics_when,
  levels = 1:5,
  labels = c("<1mo", "3-6mo", "6-12mo", "1-3yr", ">3yr")
)
# Combine groups 2,3,4 into a single "3-36mo" group
nfc_long <- nfc_long %>%
  mutate(
    recent_user = case_when(
      Psychedelics_when == "<1mo" ~ "<1mo",
      Psychedelics_when %in% c("3-6mo", "6-12mo", "1-3yr") ~ "3-36mo",
      Psychedelics_when == ">3yr" ~ ">3yr"
    ),
    recent_user = factor(recent_user, levels = c("<1mo", "3-36mo", ">3yr"))
  )
# Random intercept for each participant
nfc_model <- lmer(nfc_total ~ time * Psychedelics_when + (1|ID), data = nfc_long)
summary(nfc_model)
# Check pre vs post NFC change within each first-use group
nfc_emm <- emmeans(nfc_model, pairwise ~ time | Psychedelics_when)
nfc_emm$contrasts  # pairwise comparisons

nfc_model_recent <- lmer(nfc_total ~ time * recent_user + (1|ID), data = nfc_long)
summary(nfc_model_recent)

nfc_emm_recent <- emmeans(nfc_model_recent, pairwise ~ time | recent_user)
nfc_emm_recent$contrasts
```
```{r}
#Make bar graphs for all change scores as a function of psychedelics_num
aaq_combined <- aaq_combined %>% select(-any_of("Psychedelics_num"))
nfc_combined <- nfc_combined %>% select(-any_of("Psychedelics_num"))
cfs_combined <- cfs_combined %>% select(-any_of("Psychedelics_num"))
wmq_combined <- wmq_combined %>% select(-any_of("Psychedelics_num"))
dass_combined <- dass_combined %>% select(-any_of("Psychedelics_num"))
aaq_combined <- left_join(aaq_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_num")], by = "ID")
nfc_combined <- left_join(nfc_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_num")], by = "ID")
cfs_combined <- left_join(cfs_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_num")], by = "ID")
wmq_combined <- left_join(wmq_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_num")], by = "ID")
dass_combined <- left_join(dass_combined, data_clean[, c("ID", "Psychedelics_num")], by = "ID")
label_levels <- c("1", "2-5", "6-10", "more than 10")

aaq_combined$Psychedelics_num <- factor(aaq_combined$Psychedelics_num, levels = 1:4, labels = label_levels)
nfc_combined$Psychedelics_num <- factor(nfc_combined$Psychedelics_num, levels = 1:4, labels = label_levels)
cfs_combined$Psychedelics_num <- factor(cfs_combined$Psychedelics_num, levels = 1:4, labels = label_levels)
wmq_combined$Psychedelics_num <- factor(wmq_combined$Psychedelics_num, levels = 1:4, labels = label_levels)
dass_combined$Psychedelics_num <- factor(dass_combined$Psychedelics_num, levels = 1:4, labels = label_levels)

plot_delta_num(nfc_combined, "nfc_delta", "NFC Change")
plot_delta_num(aaq_combined, "aaq_delta", "AAQ Change")
plot_delta_num(cfs_combined, "cfs_delta", "CFS Change")
plot_delta_num(wmq_combined, "wmq_totaldelta", "WMQ Total Change")
plot_delta_num(wmq_combined, "wmq_storagedelta", "WMQ Storage Change")
plot_delta_num(wmq_combined, "wmq_attentiondelta", "WMQ Attention Change")
plot_delta_num(wmq_combined, "wmq_executivedelta", "WMQ Executive Change")
plot_delta_num(dass_combined, "dass_depressiondelta", "DASS Depression Change")
plot_delta_num(dass_combined, "dass_anxietydelta", "DASS Anxiety Change")
plot_delta_num(dass_combined, "dass_stressdelta", "DASS Stress Change")

# Define delta variables for each data frame
delta_vars <- list(
  aaq  = list(df = aaq_combined,  deltas = c("aaq_delta")),
  nfc  = list(df = nfc_combined,  deltas = c("nfc_delta")),
  cfs  = list(df = cfs_combined,  deltas = c("cfs_delta")),
  wmq  = list(df = wmq_combined,  deltas = c("wmq_totaldelta", "wmq_storagedelta", 
                                               "wmq_attentiondelta", "wmq_executivedelta")),
  dass = list(df = dass_combined, deltas = c("dass_depressiondelta", "dass_anxietydelta", 
                                               "dass_stressdelta"))
)

# Run lm for each outcome
for(name in names(delta_vars)){
  df <- delta_vars[[name]]$df
  df$Psychedelics_num_raw  <- as.numeric(df$Psychedelics_num)
  df$Psychedelics_when_raw <- as.numeric(df$Psychedelics_when)
  
  for(delta in delta_vars[[name]]$deltas){
    cat("\n========================================\n")
    cat("Outcome:", delta, "\n")
    cat("========================================\n")
    formula <- as.formula(paste(delta, "~ Psychedelics_num_raw + Psychedelics_when_raw"))
    print(summary(lm(formula, data = df)))
  }
}

```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(broom)

# =========================================================
# 0) BUILD A MASTER DATASET
# =========================================================

# Rename keeps to ID for single-timepoint measures
names(meq_output)[names(meq_output) == "keeps"] <- "ID"
names(ceq_output)[names(ceq_output) == "keeps"] <- "ID"
names(piq_output)[names(piq_output) == "keeps"] <- "ID"

# Restrict analysis
data_clean_time <- data_clean %>%
  filter(Psychedelics_when %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5))

# Build master_df with everything
master_df <- data_clean_time %>%
  select(ID) %>%
  left_join(dass_combined %>% select(ID, dass.depression_pre, dass.depression_post,
                     dass.anxiety_pre, dass.anxiety_post, dass.stress_pre, dass.stress_post,
                     dass_depressiondelta, dass_anxietydelta, dass_stressdelta), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(nfc_combined %>% select(ID, nfc.total_pre, nfc.total_post, nfc_delta), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(aaq_combined %>% select(ID, aaq.total_pre, aaq.total_post, aaq_delta), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(cfs_combined %>% select(ID, cfs.total_pre, cfs.total_post, cfs_delta), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(wmq_combined %>% select(ID, wmq.total_pre, wmq.total_post, wmq_totaldelta,
                     wmq.storage_pre, wmq.storage_post, wmq_storagedelta,
                     wmq.attention_pre, wmq.attention_post, wmq_attentiondelta,
                     wmq.executive_pre, wmq.executive_post, wmq_executivedelta), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(meq_output %>% select(ID, meq.total, meq.mystical, meq.positive,
                     meq.transendence, meq.ineffibility, meq.total.pctmax, meq.complete), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(ceq_output %>% select(ID, ceq.fear, ceq.grief, ceq.physDistress,
                     ceq.insanity, ceq.isolation, ceq.death,
                     ceq.paranoia, ceq.total, ceq.total.pctmax), by = "ID") %>%
  left_join(piq_output %>% select(ID, psychinsight.amp, psychinsight.gap,
                     psychinsight.total), by = "ID")

# Z-score pre/post pairs by baseline
scale_map <- tribble(
  ~pre,                    ~post,
  "dass.depression_pre",   "dass.depression_post",
  "dass.anxiety_pre",      "dass.anxiety_post",
  "dass.stress_pre",       "dass.stress_post",
  "nfc.total_pre",         "nfc.total_post",
  "aaq.total_pre",         "aaq.total_post",
  "cfs.total_pre",         "cfs.total_post",
  "wmq.total_pre",         "wmq.total_post",
  "wmq.storage_pre",       "wmq.storage_post",
  "wmq.attention_pre",     "wmq.attention_post",
  "wmq.executive_pre",     "wmq.executive_post"
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(scale_map))) {
  pre_col  <- scale_map$pre[i]
  post_col <- scale_map$post[i]
  baseline_mean <- mean(master_df[[pre_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  baseline_sd   <- sd(master_df[[pre_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  master_df[[paste0(pre_col, "_z")]]  <- (master_df[[pre_col]]  - baseline_mean) / baseline_sd
  master_df[[paste0(post_col, "_z")]] <- (master_df[[post_col]] - baseline_mean) / baseline_sd
}

# Z-score delta scores
delta_vars <- c("nfc_delta", "aaq_delta", "cfs_delta",
                "wmq_totaldelta", "wmq_storagedelta",
                "wmq_attentiondelta", "wmq_executivedelta",
                "dass_depressiondelta", "dass_anxietydelta", "dass_stressdelta")

for (var in delta_vars) {
  master_df[[paste0(var, "_z")]] <- scale(master_df[[var]])[, 1]
}

# Z-score single-timepoint measures (MEQ, CEQ, PIQ)
single_tp_vars <- c("meq.total", "meq.mystical", "meq.positive", "meq.transendence",
                    "meq.ineffibility", "ceq.total", "ceq.fear", "ceq.grief",
                    "ceq.physDistress", "ceq.insanity", "ceq.isolation", "ceq.death",
                    "ceq.paranoia", "psychinsight.amp", "psychinsight.gap", "psychinsight.total")

for (var in single_tp_vars) {
  master_df[[paste0(var, "_z")]] <- scale(master_df[[var]])[, 1]
}
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# 1) DOES MOOD IMPROVE PRE VS POST?
#    (Depression, Anxiety, Stress)
# =========================================================

make_prepost_long <- function(df, id_col, pre_col, post_col, value_name) {
  df %>%
    select(all_of(c(id_col, pre_col, post_col))) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(c(pre_col, post_col)),
      names_to = "time",
      values_to = value_name
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      time = factor(time,
                    levels = c(pre_col, post_col),
                    labels = c("Pre", "Post"))
    )
}

run_prepost_mixed <- function(long_df, outcome, title_text, ylab_text) {
  form <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ time + (1 | ID)"))
  model <- lmer(form, data = long_df)
  
  print(summary(model))
  print(emmeans(model, pairwise ~ time))
  
  p <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = time, y = .data[[outcome]], group = ID)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "gray70") +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "line",
      linewidth = 1.4,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "point",
      size = 3,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun.data = mean_se,
      geom = "errorbar",
      width = 0.08,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Time",
      y = ylab_text
    )
  
  print(p)
  
  invisible(model)
}

# Depression
dep_long <- make_prepost_long(master_df, "ID", "dass.depression_pre_z", "dass.depression_post_z", "depression")
dep_model <- run_prepost_mixed(dep_long, "depression", "Pre/Post DASS Depression", "DASS Depression")

# Anxiety
anx_long <- make_prepost_long(master_df, "ID", "dass.anxiety_pre_z", "dass.anxiety_post_z", "anxiety")
anx_model <- run_prepost_mixed(anx_long, "anxiety", "Pre/Post DASS Anxiety", "DASS Anxiety")

# Stress
stress_long <- make_prepost_long(master_df, "ID", "dass.stress_pre_z", "dass.stress_post_z", "stress")
stress_model <- run_prepost_mixed(stress_long, "stress", "Pre/Post DASS Stress", "DASS Stress")
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# 2) DO MOOD AND COGNITIVE MEASURES CORRELATE
#    AT BASELINE AND AT POST?
# =========================================================

mood_vars_pre  <- c("dass.depression_pre_z", "dass.anxiety_pre_z", "dass.stress_pre_z")
mood_vars_post <- c("dass.depression_post_z", "dass.anxiety_post_z", "dass.stress_post_z")
cog_vars_pre   <- c("nfc.total_pre_z", "aaq.total_pre_z", "cfs.total_pre_z",
                    "wmq.total_pre_z", "wmq.storage_pre_z", "wmq.attention_pre_z", "wmq.executive_pre_z")
cog_vars_post  <- c("nfc.total_post_z", "aaq.total_post_z", "cfs.total_post_z",
                    "wmq.total_post_z", "wmq.storage_post_z", "wmq.attention_post_z", "wmq.executive_post_z")

cor_table_builder <- function(df, mood_vars, cog_vars, time_label) {
  expand_grid(
    mood = mood_vars,
    cognitive = cog_vars
  ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      test = list(cor.test(df[[mood]], df[[cognitive]], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")),
      estimate = unname(test$estimate),
      p.value = test$p.value,
      conf.low = test$conf.int[1],
      conf.high = test$conf.int[2],
      time = time_label
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(time, mood, cognitive, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high) %>%
    mutate(
      p.fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr")
    )
}

cor_results_pre <- cor_table_builder(master_df, mood_vars_pre, cog_vars_pre, "Pre")
cor_results_post <- cor_table_builder(master_df, mood_vars_post, cog_vars_post, "Post")

cor_results_all <- bind_rows(cor_results_pre, cor_results_post)

print(cor_results_all)

# Heatmap of correlations
cor_plot_df <- cor_results_all %>%
  mutate(
    mood = factor(mood, levels = c(
      "dass.depression_pre_z", "dass.anxiety_pre_z", "dass.stress_pre_z",
      "dass.depression_post_z", "dass.anxiety_post_z", "dass.stress_post_z"
    )),
    cognitive = factor(cognitive, levels = c(
      "nfc.total_pre_z", "aaq.total_pre_z", "cfs.total_pre_z", "wmq.total_pre_z",
      "wmq.storage_pre_z", "wmq.attention_pre_z", "wmq.executive_pre_z",
      "nfc.total_post_z", "aaq.total_post_z", "cfs.total_post_z", "wmq.total_post_z",
      "wmq.storage_post_z", "wmq.attention_post_z", "wmq.executive_post_z"
    ))
  )

ggplot(cor_results_all,
       aes(x = cognitive, y = mood, fill = estimate)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", estimate)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "navy", mid = "white", high = "firebrick", midpoint = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~ time, scales = "free") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mood-Cognition Correlations at Pre and Post",
    x = "Cognitive Measure",
    y = "Mood Measure",
    fill = "r"
  )

# Example scatterplot helper for any single pair
plot_corr_pair <- function(df, xvar, yvar, title_text, xlab_text = NULL, ylab_text = NULL) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[xvar]], y = .data[[yvar]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = TRUE) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = ifelse(is.null(xlab_text), xvar, xlab_text),
      y = ifelse(is.null(ylab_text), yvar, ylab_text)
    )
}

# Example:
print(
  plot_corr_pair(
    master_df,
    "dass.depression_pre_z",
    "nfc.total_pre_z",
    "Baseline Depression vs Baseline NfC",
    "Baseline Depression",
    "Baseline NfC"
  )
)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# 3) OMNIBUS TESTS: ALL COGNITIVE MEASURES (PRE VS POST)
# =========================================================

cognitive_map <- tribble(
  ~measure,        ~pre,                    ~post,                   ~ylab,
  "NfC",           "nfc.total_pre_z",       "nfc.total_post_z",      "NfC (z)",
  "AAQ",           "aaq.total_pre_z",       "aaq.total_post_z",      "AAQ (z)",
  "CFS",           "cfs.total_pre_z",       "cfs.total_post_z",      "CFS (z)",
  "WMQ Total",     "wmq.total_pre_z",       "wmq.total_post_z",      "WMQ Total (z)",
  "WMQ Storage",   "wmq.storage_pre_z",     "wmq.storage_post_z",    "WMQ Storage (z)",
  "WMQ Attention", "wmq.attention_pre_z",   "wmq.attention_post_z",  "WMQ Attention (z)",
  "WMQ Executive", "wmq.executive_pre_z",   "wmq.executive_post_z",  "WMQ Executive (z)"
)

# =========================================================
# Helper function
# =========================================================

run_cognitive_omnibus <- function(df, id_col, pre_col, post_col, measure_name, ylab_text) {
  
  long_df <- df %>%
    select(all_of(c(id_col, pre_col, post_col))) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(c(pre_col, post_col)),
      names_to = "time",
      values_to = "score"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      time = factor(time,
                    levels = c(pre_col, post_col),
                    labels = c("Pre", "Post"))
    )
  
  model <- lmer(score ~ time + (1 | ID), data = long_df)
  
  cat("\n=================================================\n")
  cat("OMNIBUS TEST:", measure_name, "\n")
  cat("=================================================\n")
  
  print(summary(model))
  
  emm <- emmeans(model, ~ time)
  print(emm)
  print(pairs(emm))
  
  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = time, y = score, group = ID)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "gray70") +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "line",
      linewidth = 1.4,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "point",
      size = 3,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun.data = mean_se,
      geom = "errorbar",
      width = 0.08,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Pre/Post ", measure_name),
      x = "Time",
      y = ylab_text
    )
  
  print(p)
  
  # Return tidy result
  tidy_res <- broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    filter(term == "timePost") %>%
    mutate(measure = measure_name)
  
  return(tidy_res)
}

# =========================================================
# Run all models
# =========================================================

library(broom.mixed)

omnibus_results <- map_dfr(
  seq_len(nrow(cognitive_map)),
  function(i) {
    run_cognitive_omnibus(
      df = master_df,
      id_col = "ID",
      pre_col = cognitive_map$pre[i],
      post_col = cognitive_map$post[i],
      measure_name = cognitive_map$measure[i],
      ylab_text = cognitive_map$ylab[i]
    )
  }
)

# =========================================================
# Summary table
# =========================================================

print(omnibus_results)

# Add FDR correction
omnibus_results <- omnibus_results %>%
  mutate(
    p.fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr")
  )

print(omnibus_results)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# 4) WHEN PARTICIPANTS ARE GROUPED INTO MOOD GROUPS
#    (LOW VS HIGH), HOW DO COGNITIVE MEASURES CHANGE?
#    MODEL THEM AND PLOT THEM
# =========================================================

# We will create baseline low/high groups separately for:
# depression, anxiety, stress
# Then test pre/post change in:
# NfC, AAQ, CFS, WMQ total, WMQ storage, WMQ attention, WMQ executive

cognitive_map <- tribble(
  ~measure,        ~pre,                    ~post,                   ~ylab,
  "NfC",           "nfc.total_pre_z",       "nfc.total_post_z",      "NfC (z)",
  "AAQ",           "aaq.total_pre_z",       "aaq.total_post_z",      "AAQ (z)",
  "CFS",           "cfs.total_pre_z",       "cfs.total_post_z",      "CFS (z)",
  "WMQ Total",     "wmq.total_pre_z",       "wmq.total_post_z",      "WMQ Total (z)",
  "WMQ Storage",   "wmq.storage_pre_z",     "wmq.storage_post_z",    "WMQ Storage (z)",
  "WMQ Attention", "wmq.attention_pre_z",   "wmq.attention_post_z",  "WMQ Attention (z)",
  "WMQ Executive", "wmq.executive_pre_z",   "wmq.executive_post_z",  "WMQ Executive (z)"
)

mood_group_specs <- tribble(
  ~group_name,   ~baseline_var,               ~pretty_name,
  "depression",  "dass.depression_pre_z",     "Baseline Depression Group",
  "anxiety",     "dass.anxiety_pre_z",        "Baseline Anxiety Group",
  "stress",      "dass.stress_pre_z",         "Baseline Stress Group"
)

make_mood_group_df <- function(df, baseline_var, group_var_name) {
  med <- median(df[[baseline_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  df %>%
    mutate(
      !!group_var_name := if_else(
        .data[[baseline_var]] <= med,
        "Low",
        "High"
      ),
      !!group_var_name := factor(.data[[group_var_name]], levels = c("Low", "High"))
    )
}

make_cog_long_with_group <- function(df, id_col, pre_col, post_col, group_var, outcome_name) {
  df %>%
    select(all_of(c(id_col, group_var, pre_col, post_col))) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(c(pre_col, post_col)),
      names_to = "time",
      values_to = outcome_name
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      time = factor(time, levels = c(pre_col, post_col), labels = c("Pre", "Post"))
    )
}

run_group_model_and_plot <- function(long_df, outcome, group_var, plot_title, ylab_text) {
  form <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ time * ", group_var, " + (1 | ID)"))
  model <- lmer(form, data = long_df)
  
  emm_form <- as.formula(paste0("~ time | ", group_var))
  emm <- emmeans(model, emm_form)
  
  cat("\n=================================================\n")
  cat("MODEL:", plot_title, "\n")
  cat("=================================================\n")
  print(summary(model))
  print(emm)
  print(pairs(emm))
  
  p <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = time, y = .data[[outcome]], group = ID)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.18, color = "gray70") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.20, color = "gray55") +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "line",
      linewidth = 1.3,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun = mean,
      geom = "point",
      size = 3,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = 1),
      fun.data = mean_se,
      geom = "errorbar",
      width = 0.08,
      color = "red"
    ) +
    facet_wrap(as.formula(paste("~", group_var))) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      x = "Time",
      y = ylab_text
    )
  
  print(p)
  
  invisible(model)
}

# Run all mood-group x cognitive-measure models
all_group_models <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(mood_group_specs))) {
  group_name <- mood_group_specs$group_name[i]
  baseline_var <- mood_group_specs$baseline_var[i]
  pretty_name <- mood_group_specs$pretty_name[i]
  group_var <- paste0(group_name, "_group")
  
  df_grouped <- make_mood_group_df(master_df, baseline_var, group_var)
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(cognitive_map))) {
    measure_name <- cognitive_map$measure[j]
    pre_col <- cognitive_map$pre[j]
    post_col <- cognitive_map$post[j]
    ylab_text <- cognitive_map$ylab[j]
    outcome_name <- paste0("score_", j)
    
    long_df <- make_cog_long_with_group(
      df_grouped,
      id_col = "ID",
      pre_col = pre_col,
      post_col = post_col,
      group_var = group_var,
      outcome_name = outcome_name
    )
    
    plot_title <- paste0("Pre/Post ", measure_name, " by ", pretty_name)
    
    model_key <- paste(group_name, measure_name, sep = "_")
    all_group_models[[model_key]] <- run_group_model_and_plot(
      long_df = long_df,
      outcome = outcome_name,
      group_var = group_var,
      plot_title = plot_title,
      ylab_text = ylab_text
    )
  }
}
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# SUMMARY TABLE OF ALL GROUP MODELS
# Pre-to-post contrasts for Low and High within each model
# =========================================================
library(broom.mixed)

extract_all_effects <- function(model_obj, model_name, group_var) {
  emm <- emmeans(model_obj, as.formula(paste("pairwise ~ time |", group_var)))
  as.data.frame(emm$contrasts) %>%
    mutate(model = model_name)
}

full_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(all_group_models), function(nm) {
    # Recover the group_var from the model name
    # model names are like "depression_NfC", "anxiety_AAQ", etc.
    group_name <- str_split(nm, "_")[[1]][1]
    group_var  <- paste0(group_name, "_group")
    extract_all_effects(all_group_models[[nm]], nm, group_var)
  })
)

print(full_summary)

# Extract interaction terms (does High differ from Low in their change?)
extract_interaction <- function(model_obj, model_name, group_var) {
  broom.mixed::tidy(model_obj, effects = "fixed") %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "timePost:")) %>%
    mutate(model = model_name, group_var = group_var)
}

interaction_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(all_group_models), function(nm) {
    group_name <- str_split(nm, "_")[[1]][1]
    group_var  <- paste0(group_name, "_group")
    extract_interaction(all_group_models[[nm]], nm, group_var)
  })
)

print(interaction_summary)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# OPTIONAL: CONTINUOUS-BASELINE VERSION
# Better than splitting into Low/High if you want cleaner inference
# Example for depression predicting NfC change:
# =========================================================

nfc_dep_cont_long <- master_df %>%
  select(ID, nfc.total_pre_z, nfc.total_post_z, dass.depression_pre_z) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(nfc.total_pre_z, nfc.total_post_z),
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "nfc_total"
  ) %>%
  mutate(time = factor(time, 
                       levels = c("nfc.total_pre_z", "nfc.total_post_z"), 
                       labels = c("Pre", "Post")))

nfc_dep_cont_model <- lmer(nfc_total ~ time * dass.depression_pre_z + (1 | ID),
                           data = nfc_dep_cont_long)

ggplot(master_df %>% transmute(ID, dass.depression_pre_z,
                                nfc_change = nfc.total_post_z - nfc.total_pre_z),
       aes(x = dass.depression_pre_z, y = nfc_change)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = TRUE) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Change in NfC as a Function of Baseline Depression",
    x = "Baseline Depression",
    y = "NfC Change (Post - Pre)"
  )
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 5) HOW DO ACUTE SUBJECTIVE EFFECTS PREDICT COGNITIVE CHANGE?
# =========================================================

subjective_predictors <- c(
  # MEQ subscales
  "meq.total_z", "meq.mystical_z", "meq.positive_z", 
  "meq.transendence_z", "meq.ineffibility_z",
  # CEQ subscales
  "ceq.total_z", "ceq.fear_z", "ceq.grief_z", "ceq.physDistress_z",
  "ceq.insanity_z", "ceq.isolation_z", "ceq.death_z", "ceq.paranoia_z",
  # PIQ subscales
  "psychinsight.total_z", "psychinsight.amp_z", "psychinsight.gap_z"
)

cognitive_deltas <- tribble(
  ~outcome,                 ~label,
  "nfc_delta_z",            "NfC Change",
  "aaq_delta_z",            "AAQ Change",
  "cfs_delta_z",            "CFS Change",
  "wmq_totaldelta_z",       "WMQ Total Change",
  "wmq_storagedelta_z",     "WMQ Storage Change",
  "wmq_attentiondelta_z",   "WMQ Attention Change",
  "wmq_executivedelta_z",   "WMQ Executive Change",
  "dass_depressiondelta_z", "DASS Depression Change",
  "dass_anxietydelta_z",    "DASS Anxiety Change",
  "dass_stressdelta_z",     "DASS Stress Change"
)

results_list <- list()

for (pred in subjective_predictors) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(cognitive_deltas))) {
    outcome <- cognitive_deltas$outcome[i]
    label   <- cognitive_deltas$label[i]
    
    formula  <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", pred))
    model    <- lm(formula, data = master_df)
    
    tidy_res <- broom::tidy(model) %>%
      filter(term == pred) %>%
      mutate(predictor = pred, outcome = label)
    
    results_list[[paste(pred, outcome, sep = "_")]] <- tidy_res
  }
}

subjective_results <- bind_rows(results_list) %>%
  mutate(
    instrument = case_when(
      str_detect(predictor, "meq") ~ "MEQ",
      str_detect(predictor, "ceq") ~ "CEQ",
      str_detect(predictor, "psychinsight") ~ "PIQ"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(instrument) %>%
  mutate(p.fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(instrument, predictor, outcome, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, p.fdr) %>%
  arrange(instrument, p.value)

print(subjective_results)

ggplot(subjective_results, aes(x = predictor, y = outcome, fill = estimate)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f\n(%.3f)", estimate, p.fdr)), size = 2.8) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "navy", mid = "white", high = "firebrick", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Subjective Experience Predicting Cognitive/Mood Change",
    x = "Subjective Predictor",
    y = "Outcome (Delta)",
    fill = "β"
  )
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# 6) DOSE, SUBSTANCE, AND REASON FOR USE AS PREDICTORS
#    OF COGNITIVE AND MOOD CHANGE
# =========================================================

master_df <- master_df %>% 
  select(-any_of(c("Psychedelics_dose", "Psychedelics_used", "Psychedelics_reason",
                   "reason_recreation", "reason_therapeutic", "reason_explore",
                   "reason_spiritual", "reason_other")))

master_df <- master_df %>%
  left_join(
    data_clean %>% select(ID, Psychedelics_dose, Psychedelics_used, Psychedelics_reason),
    by = "ID"
  )

master_df$Psychedelics_dose <- factor(master_df$Psychedelics_dose,
                                       levels = 1:5,
                                       labels = c("Imperceptible", "Microdose", 
                                                  "Low", "Moderate", "High"))

master_df$Psychedelics_used <- factor(master_df$Psychedelics_used,
                                       levels = 1:6,
                                       labels = c("LSD", "Psilocybin", "DMT", 
                                                  "5-MEO-DMT", "Mescaline", "Ayahuasca"))

# From the survey: 1=Recreation, 2=Therapeutic, 3=Self-Exploration, 4=spiritual, 5=Other
master_df <- master_df %>%
  mutate(
    reason_recreation  = as.integer(str_detect(Psychedelics_reason, "1")),
    reason_therapeutic = as.integer(str_detect(Psychedelics_reason, "2")),
    reason_explore    = as.integer(str_detect(Psychedelics_reason, "3")),
    reason_spiritual   = as.integer(str_detect(Psychedelics_reason, "4")),
    reason_other       = as.integer(str_detect(Psychedelics_reason, "5"))
  )

use_predictors <- c("Psychedelics_dose", "Psychedelics_used", 
                    "reason_recreation", "reason_therapeutic",
                    "reason_explore", "reason_spiritual", "reason_other")

results_list_use <- list()

# Substance counts
cat("\n=== Substance Used ===\n")
print(table(master_df$Psychedelics_used))

# Dose counts
cat("\n=== Dose ===\n")
print(table(master_df$Psychedelics_dose))

# Reason counts (each binary column separately)
cat("\n=== Reasons for Use ===\n")
reason_counts <- data.frame(
  Reason = c("Recreation", "Therapeutic", "Self-Exploration", "Spiritual", "Other"),
  Count  = c(
    sum(master_df$reason_recreation,  na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(master_df$reason_therapeutic, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(master_df$reason_explore,     na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(master_df$reason_spiritual,   na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(master_df$reason_other,       na.rm = TRUE)
  )
) %>%
  mutate(Percent = round(Count / nrow(master_df) * 100, 1))

print(reason_counts)


for (pred in use_predictors) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(cognitive_deltas))) {
    outcome <- cognitive_deltas$outcome[i]
    label   <- cognitive_deltas$label[i]
    
    formula  <- as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", pred))
    model    <- lm(formula, data = master_df)
    
    tidy_res <- broom::tidy(model) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
      mutate(predictor = pred, outcome = label)
    
    results_list_use[[paste(pred, outcome, sep = "_")]] <- tidy_res
  }
}

use_results <- bind_rows(results_list_use) %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      predictor == "Psychedelics_dose" ~ "dose",
      predictor == "Psychedelics_used" ~ "substance",
      str_detect(predictor, "reason") ~ "reason"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  mutate(p.fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(category, predictor, term, outcome, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, p.fdr) %>%
  arrange(category, p.value)

print(use_results)
```

```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Cmd+Option+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Cmd+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file). 

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
